_readme: Analyst hit-rate tracking. The workflow commits this file back after each run. Add analysts as they appear; seed tier from documented records (e.g. SportsLine publishes runs like '16-6'). effectiveWeight = tierWeight * (0.5 + hitRate) once graded >= 10, else tierWeight.
